package rulecoverage

func PositiveMapperOutsideMapperPackageWhenRepoUsesMappers() string {
    ruleID := "mapper_outside_mapper_package_when_repo_uses_mappers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Mapper functions scattered across handlers and services when the repo already has a dedicated mapping package."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
